MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Jul-10-2017 Dismissal - No Appearance

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Defendant Rlj C San Francisco Lessee, Lp To Respond To Plaintiffs Second Demand For Production Of Documents, And To Pay The Reasonable Expenses Of The Motion
Off Calendar Nov-02-2016 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

PLAINTIFF GOAL CONSTRUCTION CO., INC.'s Motion To Compel Defendant Rlj C San Francisco Lessee, Lp To Respond To Plaintiffs Second Demand For Production Of Documents, And To Pay The Reasonable Expenses Of The Motion is GRANTED, no opposition filed. Complete responses without objections must be provided within 10 days of notice of entry of order. Sanctions granted in the amount of $1,370.90. Moving party prepare order. Prevailing party to submit order in compliance with CRC 3.1312(b). Judge: Ronald E. Quidachay, Clerk: M. Goodman, Not Reported (D501)
